rationale: This cycle brings no events with meaningful direct impact on Portugal — Iran deal stalemate continues with marginal energy price implications, no Iberian climate events reported.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty keeps mild upward pressure on energy prices, with a small indirect effect on Portuguese household costs and tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes; Portugal shares similar Atlantic exposure and migration pressure, though no direct policy change yet.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher on espionage charges
top_events.summary: US-China tensions could affect global trade and EU economic conditions, but impact on Portugal's daily life remains very distant and indirect.
